economic_notes: First Nation has a one-seventh ownership interest in South Beach Group of Partnerships (casino and hotel). Asatiwisipe Construction Inc. does road construction. Negginan Fishing Station Ltd. does commercial fishing. Apinonchisiwigamik Group Home is an 8-bedroom foster care facility. Annual payout to First Nation Members of $388,000 from Special Projects Bank Account.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Consolidated entity includes Poplar River First Nation Government, Housing Authority, Asatiwisipe Construction Inc., Negginan Fishing Station Ltd., and Poplar River Development Corp. South Beach Group of Partnerships accounted for by modified equity method (one-seventh interest). Large construction in progress of $16,855,731 (school and housing) drove significant increase in net debt. Accounts payable includes $3,629,987 for school construction and $1,256,906 for housing construction. CMHC mortgage subsidies treated as government transfers. expenses_enterprises represents Asatiwisipe Construction Inc. ($1,448,156) + Negginan Fishing Station Ltd. ($1,180,039). annual_debt_service reflects long-term debt repayments per cash flow statement. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text.
